---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Fix typos, clarify explanations, or add missing examples
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Location

Which file or section needs improvement? (e.g., README quickstart, API docs, CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Current State

What does it say now? Paste the relevant text if applicable.

## Suggested Change

What should it say instead? Why is this clearer?

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help someone make this change?
